languages.text: "Сколь удивительно то, что это неестественное создание еще живет, в то время как более достойные пали его жертвами". {n}Эоганн подплывает к {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}сервитору{/g} и перещелкивает несколько латунных тумблеров в его черепе.{/n} "Надеюсь, когитатор стационарного толкователя все еще исправен".

traits.locale_text: "Сколь удивительно то, что это неестественное создание еще живет, в то время как более достойные пали его жертвами". {n}Эо-ганн подплывает к {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}сервитору{/g} и перещелкивает несколько латунных тумблеров в его черепе.{/n} "Надеюсь, органический когитатор стационарного толкователя все еще исправен".
traits.speaker: EogannCompanion

languages.text: "How remarkable that this unnatural creature endures while those more worthy have fallen victim to it." {n}Eogunn floats over to the {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g} and flicks a few brass toggle switches in its skull.{/n} "I hope the cogitator of the integrated Elucidator is still functional."
languages.original_text: "Сколь удивительно то, что это неестественное создание еще живет, в то время как более достойные пали его жертвами". {n}Эоганн подплывает к {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}сервитору{/g} и перещелкивает несколько латунных тумблеров в его черепе.{/n} "Надеюсь, когитатор стационарного толкователя все еще исправен".

traits.locale_text: "How remarkable that this unnatural creature endures while those more worthy have fallen victim to it." {n}Eogunn floats over to the {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g} and flicks a few brass toggle switches in its skull.{/n} "I hope the cogitator of the integrated Elucidator is still functional."

"How remarkable that this unnatural creature endures while those more worthy have fallen victim to it." {n}Eo-gann floats over to the servitor and flicks a few brass toggle switches in its skull.{/n} "I hope the organic cogitator of the integrated Elucidator is still functional."

"How remarkable that this unnatural creature endures while those more worthy have fallen victim to it." {n}Eo-gann floats over to the servitor and flicks a few brass toggle switches in its skull.{/n} "I hope the organic cogitator of the integrated Elucidator is still functional."

"How remarkable that this unnatural creature endures while those more worthy have fallen victim to it." {n}Eogunn floats over to the {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g} and flicks a few brass toggle switches in its skull.{/n} "I hope the cogitator of the integrated Elucidator is still functional."

"How remarkable that this unnatural creature endures while those more worthy have fallen victim to it." {n}Eogunn floats over to the {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g} and flicks a few brass toggle switches in its skull.{/n} "I hope the cogitator of the integrated Elucidator is still functional."

languages.text: “真是讽刺，这等非自然的造物竟然存活了下来，而更有价值的存在却沦为了它的牺牲品。”{n}伊奥贡飘至{g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}机仆{/g}旁，拨动了其颅骨内的数枚黄铜开关。{/n}“但愿这台集成式阐释器的沉思者还能运转。”
languages.original_text: "How remarkable that this unnatural creature endures while those more worthy have fallen victim to it." {n}Eogunn floats over to the {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g} and flicks a few brass toggle switches in its skull.{/n} "I hope the cogitator of the integrated Elucidator is still functional."

traits.locale_text: “真是讽刺，这等非自然的造物竟然存活了下来，而更有价值的存在却沦为了它的牺牲品。”{n}伊奥贡飘至{g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}机仆{/g}旁，拨动了其颅骨内的数枚黄铜开关。{/n}“但愿这台集成式阐释器的沉思者还能运转。”

languages.text: «Es curioso cómo este ser antinatural permanece con vida, mientras que aquellos más dignos han caído a sus manos». {n}Eogunn flota hacia el {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servidor{/g} y activa unos interruptores de latón en su cráneo.{/n} «Espero que el cogitador del dilucidador integrado siga funcional».
languages.original_text: "How remarkable that this unnatural creature endures while those more worthy have fallen victim to it." {n}Eogunn floats over to the {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g} and flicks a few brass toggle switches in its skull.{/n} "I hope the cogitator of the integrated Elucidator is still functional."

traits.locale_text: «Es curioso cómo este ser antinatural permanece con vida, mientras que aquellos más dignos han caído a sus manos». {n}Eogunn flota hacia el {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servidor{/g} y activa unos interruptores de latón en su cráneo.{/n} «Espero que el cogitador del dilucidador integrado siga funcional».

languages.text: « Il est vraiment remarquable que cette créature contre nature ait survécu, tandis que d'autres bien plus dignes sont tombées devant elle. » {n}Eogunn flotte jusqu'au {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g} et actionne une série d'interrupteurs en laiton dans son crâne.{/n} « J'espère que le cogitateur de l'élucidateur intégré fonctionne encore. »
languages.original_text: "How remarkable that this unnatural creature endures while those more worthy have fallen victim to it." {n}Eogunn floats over to the {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g} and flicks a few brass toggle switches in its skull.{/n} "I hope the cogitator of the integrated Elucidator is still functional."

traits.locale_text: « Il est vraiment remarquable que cette créature contre nature ait survécu, tandis que d'autres bien plus dignes sont tombées devant elle. » {n}Eogunn flotte jusqu'au {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g} et actionne une série d'interrupteurs en laiton dans son crâne.{/n} « J'espère que le cogitateur de l'élucidateur intégré fonctionne encore. »

languages.text: "Daha değerli kimseler kurban giderken bu doğa dışı yaratığın sağ kalması pek dikkat çekici." {n}Eogunn, süzülerek {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}hizmetör{/g}yanına gidiyor ve kafatasındaki birkaç pirinç düğmeyi çeviriyor.{/n} "Umarım entegre Aydınlatıcı'nın kavramsayarı hâlâ çalışıyordur."
languages.original_text: "How remarkable that this unnatural creature endures while those more worthy have fallen victim to it." {n}Eogunn floats over to the {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g} and flicks a few brass toggle switches in its skull.{/n} "I hope the cogitator of the integrated Elucidator is still functional."

traits.locale_text: "Daha değerli kimseler kurban giderken bu doğa dışı yaratığın sağ kalması pek dikkat çekici." {n}Eogunn, süzülerek {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}hizmetör{/g}yanına gidiyor ve kafatasındaki birkaç pirinç düğmeyi çeviriyor.{/n} "Umarım entegre Aydınlatıcı'nın kavramsayarı hâlâ çalışıyordur."

languages.text: "Erstaunlich, dass diese unnatürliche Kreatur lebt, während ihr weit würdigere zum Opfer fielen." {n}Eogunn schwebt zu dem {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}Servitor{/g} und legt einige Messingschalter in dessen Schädel um.{/n} "Ich hoffe, der Cogitator des integrierten Elucidators funktioniert noch."
languages.original_text: "How remarkable that this unnatural creature endures while those more worthy have fallen victim to it." {n}Eogunn floats over to the {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}servitor{/g} and flicks a few brass toggle switches in its skull.{/n} "I hope the cogitator of the integrated Elucidator is still functional."

traits.locale_text: "Erstaunlich, dass diese unnatürliche Kreatur lebt, während ihr weit würdigere zum Opfer fielen." {n}Eogunn schwebt zu dem {g|Encyclopedia:Servitor}Servitor{/g} und legt einige Messingschalter in dessen Schädel um.{/n} "Ich hoffe, der Cogitator des integrierten Elucidators funktioniert noch."

languages.text: 「この不自然な生き物に耐えるとは、実に驚くべきことだ。もっと価値のある者たちは、この生き物に襲われてしまったのだ。」{n}エオガンは、その生き物に近づき、その頭蓋骨にあるいくつかの真鍮製のトグルスイッチを操作する。{/n}「統合された解明者の中の有機的な思考装置がまだ機能していることを願う」
languages.original_text: "How remarkable that this unnatural creature endures while those more worthy have fallen victim to it." {n}Eogunn floats over to the servitor and flicks a few brass toggle switches in its skull.{/n} "I hope the organic cogitator of the integrated Elucidator is still functional."

traits.locale_text: 「この不自然な生き物に耐えるとは、実に驚くべきことだ。もっと価値のある者たちは、この生き物に襲われてしまったのだ。」{n}エオガンは、その生き物に近づき、その頭蓋骨にあるいくつかの真鍮製のトグルスイッチを操作する。「統合された解明者の中の有機的な思考装置がまだ機能していることを願う。」
